# Achievement Hub

> Achievement Hub is a web application that helps Steam players track game achievements, monitor completion progress, and compare statistics with other users.

Achievement Hub is built using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js). Users connect a public Steam profile and synchronize their game library using the Steam Web API.

## Features
- User registration and authentication
- Steam account linking
- Steam library synchronization
- Achievement synchronization
- Individual game progress
- Completion percentage tracking
- User dashboard
- Community leaderboard

## Data Sources
- Steam Web API
- Public Steam Community profiles

## Technology
- MongoDB
- Express
- React
- Node.js
- JWT authentication

Achievement Hub is an independent project and is not affiliated with Valve Corporation.
